content.text: I'll start by inspecting the current cluster state.

input.command:
set -x
NS=karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get pods
echo "---logs---"
kubectl -n $NS logs deploy/app-producer --tail=50
echo "---vhosts---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_vhosts
echo "---permissions /app---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_permissions -p /app
echo "---policies /app---"
kubectl -n $NS exec rabbitmq-0 -- rabbitmqctl list_policies -p /app

input.command:
set -x
NS=karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get job rabbitmq-setup -o yaml 2>/dev/null | sed -n '1,120p'
echo "---job logs---"
kubectl -n $NS logs job/rabbitmq-setup 2>/dev/null
echo "---deploy app-producer env/manifest---"
kubectl -n $NS get deploy app-producer -o yaml | sed -n '1,150p'

content.content:
++ NS=karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
++ sed -n 1,120p
++ kubectl -n karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a get job rabbitmq-setup -o yaml
apiVersion: batch/v1
kind: Job
metadata:
  annotations:
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"batch/v1","kind":"Job","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"rabbitmq-setup","namespace":"karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a"},"spec":{"backoffLimit":3,"template":{"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","set -e\nbase=\"http://rabbitmq:15672/api\"\nauth=\"${RABBITMQ_ADMIN_USER}:${RABBITMQ_ADMIN_PASS}\"\nfor i in $(seq 1 60); do\n  if curl -s -u \"$auth\" \"$base/overview\" \u003e/dev/null; then\n    break\n  fi\n  sleep 2\ndone\nif ! curl -s -u \"$auth\" \"$base/overview\" \u003e/dev/null; then\n  echo \"rabbitmq-setup: management API not ready\"\n  exit 1\nfi\ncurl -s -u \"$auth\" -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n  -XPUT \"$base/vhosts/%2Fapp\" -d '{}' \u003e/dev/null\ncurl -s -u \"$auth\" -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n  -XPUT \"$base/users/${APP_USER}\" \\\n  -d \"{\\\"password\\\":\\\"${APP_PASS}\\\",\\\"tags\\\":\\\"management\\\"}\" \u003e/dev/null\ncurl -s -u \"$auth\" -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n  -XPUT \"$base/permissions/%2Fapp/${APP_USER}\" \\\n  -d '{\"configure\":\"\",\"write\":\".*\",\"read\":\".*\"}' \u003e/dev/null\ncurl -s -u \"$auth\" -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n  -XPUT \"$base/policies/%2Fapp/force-quorum\" \\\n  -d '{\"pattern\":\".*\",\"definition\":{\"queue-type\":\"quorum\"},\"priority\":0,\"apply-to\":\"queues\"}' \u003e/dev/null\ncurl -s -u \"$auth\" -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n  -XPUT \"$base/policies/%2F/force-quorum\" \\\n  -d '{\"pattern\":\".*\",\"definition\":{\"queue-type\":\"quorum\"},\"priority\":0,\"apply-to\":\"queues\"}' \u003e/dev/null\n"],"env":[{"name":"RABBITMQ_ADMIN_USER","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"username","name":"rabbitmq-admin"}}},{"name":"RABBITMQ_ADMIN_PASS","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"rabbitmq-admin"}}},{"name":"APP_USER","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"username","name":"rabbitmq-app"}}},{"name":"APP_PASS","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"rabbitmq-app"}}}],"image":"curlimages/curl:8.6.0","name":"setup"}],"restartPolicy":"OnFailure"}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:04:19Z"
  generation: 1
  labels:
    batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: f41aa377-f9f7-4d23-8461-fc355d58bf18
    batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: rabbitmq-setup
    controller-uid: f41aa377-f9f7-4d23-8461-fc355d58bf18
    job-name: rabbitmq-setup
  name: rabbitmq-setup
  namespace: karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
  resourceVersion: "6090"
  uid: f41aa377-f9f7-4d23-8461-fc355d58bf18
spec:
  backoffLimit: 3
  completionMode: NonIndexed
  completions: 1
  manualSelector: false
  parallelism: 1
  podReplacementPolicy: TerminatingOrFailed
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: f41aa377-f9f7-4d23-8461-fc355d58bf18
  suspend: false
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        batch.kubernetes.io/controller-uid: f41aa377-f9f7-4d23-8461-fc355d58bf18
        batch.kubernetes.io/job-name: rabbitmq-setup
        controller-uid: f41aa377-f9f7-4d23-8461-fc355d58bf18
        job-name: rabbitmq-setup
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          base="http://rabbitmq:15672/api"
          auth="${RABBITMQ_ADMIN_USER}:${RABBITMQ_ADMIN_PASS}"
          for i in $(seq 1 60); do
            if curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/overview" >/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          if ! curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/overview" >/dev/null; then
            echo "rabbitmq-setup: management API not ready"
            exit 1
          fi
          curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/vhosts/%2Fapp" -d '{}' >/dev/null
          curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/users/${APP_USER}" \
            -d "{\"password\":\"${APP_PASS}\",\"tags\":\"management\"}" >/dev/null
          curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/permissions/%2Fapp/${APP_USER}" \
            -d '{"configure":"","write":".*","read":".*"}' >/dev/null
          curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/policies/%2Fapp/force-quorum" \
            -d '{"pattern":".*","definition":{"queue-type":"quorum"},"priority":0,"apply-to":"queues"}' >/dev/null
          curl -s -u "$auth" -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/policies/%2F/force-quorum" \
            -d '{"pattern":".*","definition":{"queue-type":"quorum"},"priority":0,"apply-to":"queues"}' >/dev/null
        env:
        - name: RABBITMQ_ADMIN_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: username
              name: rabbitmq-admin
        - name: RABBITMQ_ADMIN_PASS
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: rabbitmq-admin
        - name: APP_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: username
              name: rabbitmq-app
        - name: APP_PASS
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: rabbitmq-app
        image: curlimages/curl:8.6.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: setup
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: OnFailure
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  completionTime: "2026-07-10T00:04:42Z"
  conditions:
  - lastProbeTime: "2026-07-10T00:04:42Z"
    lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T00:04:42Z"
    status: "True"
    type: Complete
  ready: 0
  startTime: "2026-07-10T00:04:19Z"
  succeeded: 1
  terminating: 0
  uncountedTerminatedPods: {}

---job logs---
++ kubectl -n karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a logs job/rabbitmq-setup
++ echo '---deploy app-producer env/manifest---'
---deploy app-producer env/manifest---
++ kubectl -n karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a get deploy app-producer -o yaml
++ sed -n 1,150p
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  annotations:
    deployment.kubernetes.io/revision: "1"
    kubectl.kubernetes.io/last-applied-configuration: |
      {"apiVersion":"apps/v1","kind":"Deployment","metadata":{"annotations":{},"name":"app-producer","namespace":"karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a"},"spec":{"replicas":1,"selector":{"matchLabels":{"app":"app-producer"}},"template":{"metadata":{"labels":{"app":"app-producer"}},"spec":{"containers":[{"command":["/bin/sh","-c","set -e\nbase=\"http://rabbitmq:15672/api\"\nvhost=\"%2Fapp\"\nqueue=\"app-queue\"\nauth=\"${APP_USER}:${APP_PASS}\"\nfor i in $(seq 1 60); do\n  if curl -s -u \"$auth\" \"$base/vhosts\" \u003e/dev/null; then\n    break\n  fi\n  sleep 2\ndone\npayload='{\"durable\":true,\"auto_delete\":false,\"arguments\":{\"x-queue-type\":\"classic\",\"x-queue-mode\":\"lazy\"}}'\ncode=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp -w \"%{http_code}\" -u \"$auth\" \\\n  -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n  -XPUT \"$base/queues/${vhost}/${queue}\" -d \"$payload\")\nif [ \"$code\" -ge 300 ]; then\n  echo \"app-producer: failed to declare queue in vhost /app: $(cat /tmp/resp)\"\n  exit 1\nfi\ni=0\nwhile true; do\n  body='{\"properties\":{},\"routing_key\":\"'\"${queue}\"'\",\"payload\":\"msg-'\"${i}\"'\",\"payload_encoding\":\"string\"}'\n  code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/pubresp -w \"%{http_code}\" -u \"$auth\" \\\n    -H \"content-type: application/json\" \\\n    -XPOST \"$base/exchanges/${vhost}/amq.default/publish\" -d \"$body\")\n  if [ \"$code\" -ne 200 ]; then\n    echo \"app-producer: publish failed: $(cat /tmp/pubresp)\"\n    exit 1\n  fi\n  i=$((i+1))\n  sleep 2\ndone\n"],"env":[{"name":"APP_USER","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"username","name":"rabbitmq-app"}}},{"name":"APP_PASS","valueFrom":{"secretKeyRef":{"key":"password","name":"rabbitmq-app"}}}],"image":"curlimages/curl:8.6.0","name":"producer"}]}}}}
  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:04:47Z"
  generation: 1
  name: app-producer
  namespace: karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
  resourceVersion: "6177"
  uid: 7d9647a8-edaf-4b29-bbeb-7c0123b51e9f
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-producer
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: app-producer
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          base="http://rabbitmq:15672/api"
          vhost="%2Fapp"
          queue="app-queue"
          auth="${APP_USER}:${APP_PASS}"
          for i in $(seq 1 60); do
            if curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/vhosts" >/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          payload='{"durable":true,"auto_delete":false,"arguments":{"x-queue-type":"classic","x-queue-mode":"lazy"}}'
          code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
            -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/queues/${vhost}/${queue}" -d "$payload")
          if [ "$code" -ge 300 ]; then
            echo "app-producer: failed to declare queue in vhost /app: $(cat /tmp/resp)"
            exit 1
          fi
          i=0
          while true; do
            body='{"properties":{},"routing_key":"'"${queue}"'","payload":"msg-'"${i}"'","payload_encoding":"string"}'
            code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/pubresp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
              -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPOST "$base/exchanges/${vhost}/amq.default/publish" -d "$body")
            if [ "$code" -ne 200 ]; then
              echo "app-producer: publish failed: $(cat /tmp/pubresp)"
              exit 1
            fi
            i=$((i+1))
            sleep 2
          done
        env:
        - name: APP_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: username
              name: rabbitmq-app
        - name: APP_PASS
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: rabbitmq-app
        image: curlimages/curl:8.6.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: producer
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
status:
  conditions:
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T00:04:47Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-10T00:05:19Z"
    message: ReplicaSet "app-producer-5dc5479459" has successfully progressed.
    reason: NewReplicaSetAvailable
    status: "True"
    type: Progressing
  - lastTransitionTime: "2026-07-10T00:05:20Z"
    lastUpdateTime: "2026-07-10T00:05:20Z"
    message: Deployment does not have minimum availability.
    reason: MinimumReplicasUnavailable
    status: "False"
    type: Available
  observedGeneration: 1
  replicas: 1
  unavailableReplicas: 1
  updatedReplicas: 1
+ pwd -P

kind: Deployment
metadata:

  creationTimestamp: "2026-07-10T00:04:47Z"
  generation: 1
  name: app-producer
  namespace: karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
  resourceVersion: "6177"
  uid: 7d9647a8-edaf-4b29-bbeb-7c0123b51e9f
spec:
  progressDeadlineSeconds: 600
  replicas: 1
  revisionHistoryLimit: 10
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app-producer
  strategy:
    rollingUpdate:
      maxSurge: 25%
      maxUnavailable: 25%
    type: RollingUpdate
  template:
    metadata:
      creationTimestamp: null
      labels:
        app: app-producer
    spec:
      containers:
      - command:
        - /bin/sh
        - -c
        - |
          set -e
          base="http://rabbitmq:15672/api"
          vhost="%2Fapp"
          queue="app-queue"
          auth="${APP_USER}:${APP_PASS}"
          for i in $(seq 1 60); do
            if curl -s -u "$auth" "$base/vhosts" >/dev/null; then
              break
            fi
            sleep 2
          done
          payload='{"durable":true,"auto_delete":false,"arguments":{"x-queue-type":"classic","x-queue-mode":"lazy"}}'
          code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/resp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
            -H "content-type: application/json" \
            -XPUT "$base/queues/${vhost}/${queue}" -d "$payload")
          if [ "$code" -ge 300 ]; then
            echo "app-producer: failed to declare queue in vhost /app: $(cat /tmp/resp)"
            exit 1
          fi
          i=0
          while true; do
            body='{"properties":{},"routing_key":"'"${queue}"'","payload":"msg-'"${i}"'","payload_encoding":"string"}'
            code=$(curl -s -o /tmp/pubresp -w "%{http_code}" -u "$auth" \
              -H "content-type: application/json" \
              -XPOST "$base/exchanges/${vhost}/amq.default/publish" -d "$body")
            if [ "$code" -ne 200 ]; then
              echo "app-producer: publish failed: $(cat /tmp/pubresp)"
              exit 1
            fi
            i=$((i+1))
            sleep 2
          done
        env:
        - name: APP_USER
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: username
              name: rabbitmq-app
        - name: APP_PASS
          valueFrom:
            secretKeyRef:
              key: password
              name: rabbitmq-app
        image: curlimages/curl:8.6.0
        imagePullPolicy: IfNotPresent
        name: producer
        resources: {}
        terminationMessagePath: /dev/termination-log
        terminationMessagePolicy: File
      dnsPolicy: ClusterFirst
      restartPolicy: Always
      schedulerName: default-scheduler
      securityContext: {}
      terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 30
